description: Maps ranked evidence-gap failure families to bounded candidate-overlay experiment templates. These templates are research/shadow only and do not grant runtime authority.

strategy_runtime_mismatch.selection_goal: Test whether paper runtime is blocked because strategy candidates are incompatible with the currently observed long-friendly regime.

templates.title: Enable a long-compatible strategy-policy overlay in shadow
templates.hypothesis: If long-friendly regimes are repeatedly producing flat/no-trade runtime targets, a bounded long-compatible strategy-policy overlay should create comparable paper candidates without bypassing risk.

templates.title: Isolate whether anomaly vetoes are suppressing long candidates
templates.hypothesis: If the candidate detector can find long-compatible setups only when anomaly veto sensitivity is relaxed in shadow, the next test should focus on risk/policy overblocking rather than strategy discovery.

templates.title: Falsify dead-candidate generator with always-candidate sanity lane
templates.hypothesis: If an always-candidate long sanity overlay still produces no candidates, the failure is below policy selection and belongs in candidate generation or data wiring.

candidate_generation_failure.selection_goal: Prove the strategy detector can emit candidates before tuning policy or risk.

templates.title: Run an always-candidate baseline
templates.hypothesis: A diagnostic always-candidate lane should create opportunity rows if the runtime wiring is intact.

risk_overblocking.selection_goal: Separate true unsafe risk rejects from missing data or stale quote failures.

templates.title: Break down risk rejection reasons
templates.hypothesis: A typed risk rejection histogram should show whether risk is overblocking or correctly vetoing unsafe setups.

quote_fill_unavailability.selection_goal: Separate executable quote availability from strategy quality.

templates.title: Audit quote availability and staleness
templates.hypothesis: If quote gaps dominate no-trade decisions, source freshness must be repaired before strategy comparisons matter.
